description: Analyze Taobao and Tmall workflows with JustOneAPI, including product Details, product Reviews, and shop Product List across 9 operations.

operations.description: Get Taobao and Tmall product Reviews data, including ratings, timestamps, and reviewer signals, for feedback analysis and product research.

parameters.description: Access token for this API service.
parameters.name: token

parameters.description: AUnique product identifier on Taobao/Tmall (item ID).
parameters.name: itemId

parameters.description:
Sort order for the result set.

Available Values:
- `feedbackdate`: Sort by feedback date
- `general`: General sorting
parameters.name: orderType

parameters.description: Page number for pagination.
parameters.name: page

operations.description: Get Taobao and Tmall shop Product List data, including item titles, prices, and images, for seller research and catalog tracking.

parameters.name: shopId

parameters.description:
Sort order for the result set.

Available Values:
- `coefp`: Comprehensive sorting
- `hotsell`: Hot selling / Sales volume
- `oldstarts`: New arrivals / Old starts
